segments.translation: 现在让我在结束之前作个总结。

segments.text: this is a serious point here
segments.translation: 这一点是认真的。

segments.text: this is where we are now right
segments.translation: 这就是我们的所在，对吗？

segments.text: we speak not very into
segments.translation: 我们说得不好，

segments.text: people who simply aren't listening
segments.translation: 人们也听不进去，

segments.text: in an environment that's all about noise and bad acoustics
segments.translation: 在一个吵闹和喧哗的环境里。

segments.text: i have talked about that on this stage
segments.translation: 我已经在讲台上

segments.text: in different phases
segments.translation: 分阶段地谈到这个问题。

segments.text: what would the world be like
segments.translation: 这个世界会是怎样，

segments.text: if we were speaking powerfully
segments.translation: 如果我们有说服力，

segments.text: to people who were listening consciously
segments.translation: 人们有意识地听，

segments.text: in environments which were actually fit for purpose or
segments.translation: 在一个量身定做的环境下？

segments.text: to make that a bit what
segments.translation: 或者说得更大一些，

segments.text: would the world be like if
segments.translation: 世界将会是怎样，

segments.text: we were creating sound consciously and
segments.translation: 如果我们有意识地说话，

segments.text: consuming sound consciously and
segments.translation: 有意识地倾听，

segments.text: designing all our environments
segments.translation: 并且有意识地针对声音

segments.text: consciously for sound
segments.translation: 来设计我们的周围环境？

segments.text: that would be a world that does sound beautiful and
segments.translation: 那会是一个听起来非常美丽的世界，

segments.text: one where understanding
segments.translation: 在那儿

segments.text: would be the and
segments.translation: 理解会是常态。

segments.text: that is an idea worth spreading
segments.translation: 那是一个值得传播的理念。

segments.text: thank you
segments.translation: 感谢你们。
